rulings.Case Title: JO ANN FARESE VS. CHASE HOME FINANCE LLC, et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 03, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Overrule, defendant failed to address Federal authorities cited by plaintiff and failed to cite any California authorities on point. Opposing party to comply with CRC 3.1113 in the future. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 616 MORAGA VENTURE ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. TERENCE ISOBE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admissions, Set Two, Special Interrogatories, Set Two, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two From Pltf'S
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 03, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT TERENCE ISOBE's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admissions, Set Two, Special Interrogatories, Set Two, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two From Plaintiff's. Grant sanctions as requested in amount of $4,862.50. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC VS. HOLLIE GARRETT et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 03, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC.'s MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Grant - settlement reached after default. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SBERLO FAMILY TRUST VS. TANYA PHILLIPS (3/19/12-AMENDED TO CONTRACT ACTION)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel The Deop Of Pltfs
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 03, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT TANYA PHILLIPS' Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Plaintiffs. Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SBERLO FAMILY TRUST VS. TANYA PHILLIPS (3/19/12-AMENDED TO CONTRACT ACTION)
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 03, 2013, line 3. CROSS DEFENDANTs NOEL SBERLO, TRUSTEES FOR THE SBERLO FAMILY, and NADINE SBERLO, TRUSTEES FOR THE SBERLO FAMILY's MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT. Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. ALBERT JOHNSON et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 03, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT ALBERT JOHNSON's MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Grant, subject to opposition and moving party posting $3840.00 due rent. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BAN THANH TRAN VS. JEAN ANN CARROLL
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 03, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT JEAN CARROLL's AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend to conform complaint to lease. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SALINA KWANG VS. QIONG YING CHEN
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 03, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT QIONG CHEN MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Grant, subject to opposition and posting rent due in amount of $4320. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SOJOURN PROPERTIES, INC VS. DAVID RHODES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 03, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANTs DAVID RHODES and DORIAN RHODES MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Grant, subject to opposition and filing Proof of Service. = (501/REQ)
